description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-drawer filing cabinet with a dark wood finish and a grid of small drawers on the front. Each drawer is fitted with a metal label holder and a round pull handle, giving it a classic, vintage appearance reminiscent of apothecary or library card catalog cabinets. The sides and back are plain and solid, lacking any decorative features or openings. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items or documents. The overall construction appears robust, likely designed to store small items or files in an organized manner. The cabinet's design suggests it is intended for use in environments where both function and traditional aesthetics are valued.
description: A dark wood multi-drawer filing cabinet with metal label holders and round pull handles, featuring a classic, vintage look. The front is detailed, while the sides and back are plain and solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing a grid of small drawers, each with a metal label holder and round pull handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with no handles or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, solid surface.
